_note: LEGACY/REFUTED DEATH-WRITE PROBE - HP=0 ALONE (docs/modding/07 Tests 2b/2c). Live evidence proved this creates a zombie-like state, not real KO. Keep this profile only for reproducing or auditing the historical byte-write result; current custom-formula profiles use MinHpFloor=1 and let the engine own death. REQUIRES neutered vanilla damage if intentionally re-run. AffectAllies=false so your own units are never zeroed.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (bit found in Test 2a, set on every death)
